entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench, the crop studied for drought tolerance

entities.name: STAY-GREEN
entities.description: A drought adaptation trait characterized by delayed leaf senescence

entities.name: SENESCENCE
entities.description: The process of biological aging in plants, often accelerated by stress

entities.name: ROOT ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The spatial configuration and structure of the root system

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION RATE
entities.description: The rate at which water is evaporated from the plant leaves

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition of water deficiency affecting plant growth

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Drought stress occurring during the terminal stages of growth

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE STAGE DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Drought stress occurring during the reproductive phase of the plant

entities.name: VAPOR PRESSURE DEFICIT
entities.description: The difference between the amount of moisture in the air and how much moisture the air can hold when saturated

entities.name: SEMIARID REGIONS
entities.description: Geographic areas with low and irregular rainfall

entities.name: B35
entities.description: A stay-green sorghum genotype

entities.name: 296B
entities.description: A stay-green sorghum genotype

entities.name: BTX623
entities.description: A senescent sorghum genotype

entities.name: R16
entities.description: A senescent sorghum genotype

entities.name: GAS EXCHANGE
entities.description: The process of exchanging gases between the plant and the atmosphere

entities.name: STOMATA
entities.description: Microscopic pores on the leaf surface that regulate gas exchange

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: TOTAL ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: The cumulative length of the root system

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The total weight of seeds produced by the plant

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHETIC RATE
entities.description: The rate at which the plant converts light energy into chemical energy

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: The physical size or weight of individual seeds

entities.name: GENOMIC MARKERS
entities.description: DNA sequences used to identify and track specific traits in breeding

entities.name: DROUGHT EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: A series of controlled tests to evaluate plant response to water deficiency
